ExplanationInput.description:
Input for explanation generation.

Supports multiple input modes:
1. By entity_id (direct KG lookup)
2. By entity_name (name-based lookup)
3. By vision_result (from vision pipeline)

Usage:
    # Direct entity lookup
    input = ExplanationInput(entity_id="ent_dog_001", age_tier=1)

    # From vision result
    input = ExplanationInput(vision_result=vision_output, age_tier=2)

    # For follow-up Q&A
    input = ExplanationInput(
        entity_name="dog",
        user_question="Why do dogs bark?",
        conversation_history=[{"role": "user", "content": "..."}]
    )

use_kg_only.description: Only use KG, no LLM fallback
use_kg_only.title: Use Kg Only

ExtensionInput.description:
Input for knowledge extension suggestions.

Supports multiple input modes:
1. By entity_id (direct KG lookup)
2. By entity_name (name-based lookup)
3. By vision_result (from vision pipeline)

Usage:
    # Direct entity lookup
    input = ExtensionInput(entity_id="ent_dog_001", age_tier=1)

    # From entity name
    input = ExtensionInput(entity_name="dog", age_tier=2)

    # From vision result
    input = ExtensionInput(vision_result=vision_output, age_tier=2)

Input for task generation.

    # By name

TaskResult.description:
A single generated task.

Represents a discoverable learning task for a child based on
a KG relation or LLM generation.

Example:
    TaskResult(
        title="Find a Friend!",
        description="Can you find 2 more pets in your home?",
        target_count=2,
        relation_type="belongs_to",
        target_entity_name="Pet",
        reward_type="discovery_badge",
        difficulty=1
    )

VisionResult-Input.description:
Enhanced vision recognition result with multi-object and diagnostic support.

For single object detection, use object_name, confidence, attributes directly.
For multi-object detection, use detected_objects list with is_multiple=True.
For diagnostic guidance (poor images), use diagnostic field.
The primary object fields always reflect detected_objects[primary_object_index].

detected_properties.title: Detected Properties

diagnostic.description: Diagnostic info for poor quality images

entity_id.description: Knowledge graph entity ID for primary object
entity_id.title: Entity Id

primary_object_index.description: Index of primary object in detected_objects
primary_object_index.title: Primary Object Index

post.description:
Respond to child's answer with streaming response.

Returns SSE stream with events:
- chunk: ConversationStreamChunk with response text and validation results
- audio: AudioStreamChunk with TTS audio (if include_audio=True)
- complete: Final completion marker
- error: On any errors

Args:
    request: Conversation respond request with session_id and child_input.
    metadata: Request metadata from middleware.

Returns:
    StreamingResponse with SSE events.

Start a new conversation with streaming response.

Returns SSE stream with events:
- chunk: ConversationStreamChunk with response text
- audio: AudioStreamChunk with TTS audio (if include_audio=True)
- complete: Final completion marker
- error: On any errors

Args:
    request: Conversation start request.
    metadata: Request metadata from middleware.

Returns:
    StreamingResponse with SSE events.

Generate explanation (non-streaming).

For clients that don't support SSE.

Stream explanation with LLM→TTS pipeline.

Returns SSE stream with events:
- llm_chunk: Text chunks from LLM
- llm_end: LLM generation complete
- tts_start: Starting TTS for a sentence
- audio_chunk: Base64 audio data
- tts_sentence_end: Sentence TTS complete
- tts_end: All TTS complete
- done: Final event with metrics
- error: On any errors

Stream topic suggestions with SSE.

Returns SSE stream with events:
- kg_results: Immediate batch of KG suggestions (if any)
- llm_chunk: Text chunks from LLM exploration (if triggered)
- llm_end: LLM generation complete with full_text
- extension_results: Final parsed suggestions with source
- done: Final event with metrics
- error: On any errors

Event flow depends on data availability:
- KG hit only: kg_results -> done
- KG miss + LLM: llm_chunk -> llm_end -> extension_results -> done
- KG partial + LLM: kg_results -> llm_chunk -> llm_end -> extension_results -> done

Get topic suggestions for knowledge extension.

Returns related topics based on KG traversal with LLM fallback.
Suggestions are ranked by relevance and filtered by age tier.

Depth limits by age tier:
- Tier 0 (ages 2-4): depth=0, max 1 suggestion
- Tier 1 (ages 4-6): depth=2, max 5 suggestions
- Tier 2 (ages 6-8): depth=3, max 7 suggestions

Create a new conversation session.

Args:
    request: Session creation request with device ID and age tier.
    request_id: Request ID for tracing.
    db: Database connection.
    settings: Application settings.

Returns:
    Created session details.

Stream pipeline execution events via SSE.

Executes the full pipeline:
1. STT: Transcribe audio input (if provided)
2. Vision: Process image (if provided)
3. LLM: Generate response
4. TTS: Convert response to speech

Events are streamed as they become available for
minimal latency.

Args:
    request: Pipeline execution request.
    request_id: Request ID for tracing.
    db: Database connection.
    settings: Application settings.

Returns:
    SSE stream of pipeline events.

post.description:
Recognize objects in an uploaded image (form-data).

Uses two-stage analysis-first pipeline for improved accuracy:
- Stage 1: Analyze image quality and detect objects
- Stage 2: Route to classification, multi-object detection, or diagnostic guidance

Response may include:
- CLASSIFY result: object_name, description, confidence, attributes, knowledge
- MULTI_SELECT result: detected_objects list with is_multiple=True
- GUIDE result: diagnostic info with tips for taking a better photo

Args:
    image: The image file to process (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP supported)
    request_id: Request ID for tracing
    db: Database connection (reserved for future use)
    settings: Application settings
    age_tier: Age tier for content adaptation (0=2-4yo, 1=4-6yo, 2=6-8yo)
    session_id: Optional session ID for context
    include_knowledge: Whether to include knowledge graph lookup
    provider: Specific provider to use (uses default if None)
    fast_mode: Use faster single-shot mode (less accurate)

Returns:
    Vision recognition results or diagnostic guidance

Raises:
    HTTPException: If recognition fails

Recognize objects in a base64-encoded image (JSON body).

Alternative to form-data upload - accepts base64 encoded image in JSON body.

Uses two-stage analysis-first pipeline for improved accuracy:
- Stage 1: Analyze image quality and detect objects
- Stage 2: Route to classification, multi-object detection, or diagnostic guidance

Args:
    request_id: Request ID for tracing
    db: Database connection (reserved for future use)
    settings: Application settings
    body: JSON body with session_id, age_tier, image (base64), and options

Returns:
    Vision recognition results or diagnostic guidance

Raises:
    HTTPException: If recognition fails

Stream recognition results in 3 phases via SSE.

Phases:
1. OBJECT (< 800ms): Object names, bounding boxes, confidence
2. ATTRIBUTES (< 1200ms): Colors, shape, size, material, orientation
3. KNOWLEDGE (< 1500ms): Categories, entity IDs, related entities

Args:
    image: The image file to process
    metadata: Request metadata for tracing
    db: Database connection (reserved for future use)
    settings: Application settings
    age_tier: Age tier for content adaptation (0-2)
    session_id: Optional session ID for context
    include_knowledge: Whether to include knowledge graph lookup
    provider: Specific provider to use (uses default if None)

Returns:
    SSE stream with VisionPhase events
